summary: Tested color/style refinements across all pages. All pages load correctly with warmer #FAF9F6 background, gradient headers, refined glassmorphism navbar, polished tabs, and ambient shadows on cards. All interactive elements remain functional.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Warmer background #FAF9F6 (rgb(250, 249, 246)) verified on Case History, Case Submission, Analysis Dashboard pages
Navbar glassmorphism: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) with backdrop-filter: blur(40px) and subtle border
Gradient header on Analysis Dashboard: from-[#0A1428] via-[#0B192C] to-[#11233D] with warm glow orb
Gold accent color #C5A059 used consistently for labels, active states, and highlights
Tab bar has polished styling with white background and subtle border
Stage stepper shows glow effects on active state: shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(197,160,89,0.3)]
seed_data_creation: Created test case 'Test Case - Style Verification' to verify Analysis Dashboard styling

Analysis Dashboard has gradient header with warm glow orb. Council cards have ambient shadows. Tab bar is polished with white background. Stage stepper has glow effects on active state. Judge Intelligence Panel has gradient header. Chief Justice card has gradient styling. All interactive elements (tabs, accordions, buttons, navigation) remain functional.
